ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "date_ordinal" INTEGER /* Ordinal date of the poll */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population demographic data */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollster conducting the poll */,
  "pollster_grade" INTEGER /* Grade given to the pollster */,
  "poll_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the poll */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollster */,
  "pollster_email" TEXT /* Email address of the pollster */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the pollster belongs to */,
  "pollster_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the pollster */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pollster was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pollster was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollster_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollster receiving the grade */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade given to the pollster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the population */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the population */,
  "demographic_description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic characteristics of the population */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the population was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the population was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_questions_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_value" INTEGER /* Value of the response (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES poll_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, pollster, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the poll */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_versions_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the collaboration belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_collaborations_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comments_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_reports_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_polls, edit_polls, delete_polls) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_tags_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)
